# terrible_community_general_aix_lvg (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `vg` (String) The name of the volume group.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Force volume group creation.
- `pp_size` (Number) The size of the physical partition in megabytes.
- `pvs` (String) List of comma-separated devices to use as physical devices in this volume group. Required when creating or extending (`present` state) the volume group. If not informed reducing (`absent` state) the volume group is removed.
- `state` (String) Control if the volume group exists and volume group AIX state varyonvg `varyon` or varyoffvg `varyoff`.
- `vg_type` (String) The type of the volume group.
